name: open-shell
description: A research-driven Electron component system for modern agentic desktop apps.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @open-shell/ui && turbo run dev --filter=@open-shell/electron-example
scripts.docs:build: npm run build -w @open-shell/ui && npm run build -w @open-shell/docs
scripts.docs:dev: npm run build -w @open-shell/ui && npm run dev -w @open-shell/docs
scripts.start: npm run build -w @open-shell/ui && npm run start -w @open-shell/electron-example
scripts.start:example: npm run build -w @open-shell/ui && npm run start -w @open-shell/electron-example
